name: Awakening of Veidos
name_jp: ヴェイドスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>目</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>覚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>め
desc: Place 1 "Obsidim, the Ashened City" from your Deck, face-up in either Field Zone, then if your opponent controls a card in their Field Zone, you can add 1 Level 5 or higher DARK Pyro monster from your Deck to your hand. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Deck or Extra Deck, except Pyro monsters. You can only activate 1 "Awakening of Veidos" per turn.
eff: Place 1 "Obsidim, the Ashened City" from your Deck, face-up in either Field Zone, then if your opponent controls a card in their Field Zone, you can add 1 Level 5 or higher DARK Pyro monster from your Deck to your hand. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Deck or Extra Deck, except Pyro monsters. You can only activate 1 "Awakening of Veidos" per turn.

action: Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
Places cards from your Deck in your opponent's Field Zone
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
